label: pricing
title: Ok, Box Box
heading: Simple, Transparent Pricing
textSnippet: SIMPLE, TRANSPARENT PRICING Live race execution. Situational awareness. Broadcast presentation. FREE FREE FOR EVERYONE RACEBOX Basic broadcast tools for leagues, streamers, and spectators. $0 forever free Public timing pages Basic timing tower overlay Basic broadcast overlays Ok, Box Box branding included START BROADCASTING MOST POPULAR FOR DRIVERS BLACKBOX Live race execution and AI crew for competitive drivers. $14/mo per driver / month AI Race Engineer (voice) AI Spotter AI Performance Analyst Live situational awareness Fuel & tire strategy Session history & IDP Opponent intel START RACING FOR TEAMS TEAMBOX Full pit wall system for team operations. Includes all BlackBox features. $26/mo per driver / month Everything in BlackBox Full Pit Wall (multi-car) Strategy timeline Team roster management Shared session reports LiveSpotter share links EQUIP YOUR TEAM FOR LEAGUES CONTROLBOX Race control automation and steward workflows for league operations. $48/mo per league / month + $2/mo per

label: download
title: Ok, Box Box
heading: Ok, Box Box Relay
textSnippet: OK, BOX BOX RELAY Connect iRacing to your dashboard Windows Relay Version 1.0.0 Live telemetry at 60Hz Voice commands with AI engineer Session logging for analysis Auto-reconnect on network issues DOWNLOAD RELAY (32 KB) Requires Windows 10+ and Python 3.10+ PREREQUISITES The relay requires Python to run. If you don't have it installed: Download Python 3.12 for Windows ✓ Check "Add Python to PATH" during installation QUICK START 1 Extract the zip to any folder 2 Copy .env.example to .env 3 Double-click START-RELAY.bat 4 Start iRacing and join a session First run will install dependencies automatically (~30 seconds) Back to Dashboard

title: Ok, Box Box
heading: Conrad Weeden
textSnippet: Back to Operations DEVELOPMENT DRIVER GROWTH 0 Rookie 50 XP 1 Level Progress 50 / 100 CURRENT PHASE Getting Started Phase Progress 0% THIS WEEK'S FOCUS Incident Reduction — Focus on Clean Laps ACTIVE GOALS Reach 1500 iRating (Oval) 0% NEXT SESSION PLAN Incident Reduction Session 1. Run 10 practice laps at 90% pace, focusing on clean lines 2. In the race, leave extra space in braking zones — brake 5m earlier 3. If someone is faster behind you, let them by cleanly 💡 A clean P15 gains more iRating than a DNF from P5. Survive first, compete second. CONRAD WEEDEN Your development journey FOCUS AREAS SKILL TREE GOALS JOURNEY Elevated Incident Rate 7.3 avg incidents per race. 12% clean races. 90% progress This is your biggest area for improvement right now 7.3 avg incidents per race. 12% clean races.
